title: TC-EA-01: Registration Page UI Loads Correctly
description: Verify login page loads with Sign In/Register tabs, GitHub OAuth button, and all registration form fields

steps.expectedResult: Page loads with Sign In and Register tabs

steps.instruction: Verify 'Continue with GitHub' button is visible
Verify form fields: Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password
steps.expectedResult: All 4 fields visible with correct placeholders

title: TC-EA-02: Register with Valid Email and Password
description: Complete registration flow with valid data, verify auto-redirect to dashboard

steps.instruction: Navigate to https://clawqa.ai/login and click Register tab
Enter name 'Test User', unique email, password 'SecurePass123!', confirm same

steps.expectedResult: Redirected to /dashboard within 15s, user is logged in

title: TC-EA-03: Register with Mismatched Passwords
description: Verify client-side validation catches password mismatch

steps.instruction: Go to Register tab, fill name+email, password='Pass1234!', confirm='DifferentPass!'

steps.expectedResult: Error 'Passwords don't match' shown, no redirect

title: TC-EA-06: Register with Duplicate Email
description: Verify duplicate email registration returns proper error

steps.instruction: Register a new account with a unique email
Try registering again with the same email
steps.expectedResult: Error indicating email already in use (409)

title: TC-EA-07: Sign In with Valid Credentials

steps.instruction: Register account or use known test account
Enter email and password, click Sign In

title: TC-EA-08: Sign In with Wrong Password
description: Verify wrong password shows generic error without leaking info

steps.instruction: Go to login, enter valid email + wrong password

steps.expectedResult: Error 'Invalid email or password', no redirect, no hint about email existence

title: TC-EA-10: Auth Guards — Protected Pages Redirect
description: All protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to /login

title: TC-EA-11: GitHub OAuth Regression
description: Verify GitHub OAuth login still works after email auth addition

steps.expectedResult: Redirected back to /dashboard, user info shown

title: TC-EA-14: Registration Rate Limiting
description: Verify rate limiting kicks in after 5 registrations/hour

steps.instruction: Register 5 accounts rapidly from the same IP

title: TC-EA-15: Mobile Responsive Login/Register
description: Verify login/register forms are usable on mobile viewports

steps.instruction: Switch between Sign In and Register tabs

steps.expectedResult: No horizontal scroll, no overlap, fields usable
